prompt: I have uploaded a file at /mnt/user-data/uploads/moby-dick.epub. Show me the table of contents.
expected_behaviors: Runs epub_reader.py info first to get book title
Runs epub_reader.py toc to get chapter list
Presents TOC as a numbered list with chapter titles
Does not attempt to read chapter content before loading TOC
Runs toc command first to map chapter locations
Presents plain text content with chapter title header
Notes truncation if content exceeds 8999 chars

prompt: Find the section about recursion in /mnt/user-data/uploads/sicp.epub
expected_behaviors: Runs search command with query recursion
Does not guess chapter location without consulting TOC
